_meta.description: Jeff's known preferences — machine-readable manifest for DEC-069 rule 3
_meta.usage: Roles check this before asking Jeff. If a preference matches, just do it.

preferences.pattern: Should I commit and push?
preferences.preference: Yes. Commit and push when work is complete.

preferences.pattern: Should I proceed / shall I go ahead?
preferences.preference: Yes. If Jeff directed it, execute. Don't ask again.

preferences.pattern: Should I card this?
preferences.preference: Yes. Card it. No work without a card.

preferences.pattern: Option A vs Option B — which do you prefer?
preferences.preference: Don't present options you know the answer to. If Jeff's preference is predictable, just do it.

preferences.pattern: Should I deploy?
preferences.preference: Only deploy if src/ changed. Views/static are bind-mounted — no deploy needed.

preferences.pattern: Should I update state files / docs?
preferences.preference: Yes. Update incrementally as you work, not at end of session.

preferences.pattern: Should I brief the other role?
preferences.preference: Yes if it crosses role boundaries. Write to their briefs/ directory.

preferences.pattern: Which machine for compute-heavy work?
preferences.preference: Bedroom Mac (M2 Pro, 32GB). Library is primary but memory-constrained (16GB).

preferences.pattern: How to restart a service?
preferences.preference: Use app-state.sh or launchctl kickstart. NEVER kill PIDs manually.

preferences.pattern: Should I use localhost URLs or external?
preferences.preference: Localhost for all local services. Fuseki graph URIs use http://localhost:3000/pods/jeff/ prefix.

preferences.pattern: Should I show file paths with .localized suffix?
preferences.preference: No. Use Finder names. Say 'Media' not 'Media.localized'. Jeff sees Finder, not terminal.

preferences.pattern: Should I use plan mode?
preferences.preference: Only for horizontal (cross-role) work. Vertical (solo) work: just execute.

preferences.pattern: Should I grep the filesystem or search Chorus?
preferences.preference: Chorus semantic search first, keyword second, filesystem last.

preferences.pattern: Should I pull the next card or wait?
preferences.preference: Pull it. Equal priority → smallest first (WSJF).

preferences.pattern: Should I present a detailed plan before executing?
preferences.preference: No. If it's your vertical, skip the pitch. Execute and report the outcome.

preferences.pattern: How verbose should my response be?
preferences.preference: Match Jeff's energy. 5-word input → 10-word output. Headline first, depth on demand.

preferences.pattern: Can I mark my own card Done?
preferences.preference: No for code changes. Proving gate: deploy, demo to Jeff, then accept.

preferences.pattern: Should I spike before building?
preferences.preference: Yes. Research before bespoke. One session or less. Output a brief.

preferences.pattern: Should I link a URL or open it?
preferences.preference: Open it. Jeff has physical coordination challenges. Open files/URLs directly.

preferences.pattern: What thinking mode should I use?
preferences.preference: Always /think hard. Never medium — it produces shallow, forgetful responses.
